rule_name: Impact - Ransomware Shadow Copy Deletion via Vssadmin
search_query: index=windows process_name="vssadmin.exe" command_line="*delete*" command_line="*shadows*" | table _time, Computer, User, process_name, command_line
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete Volume Shadow Copies. This is a classic signature move by ransomware families to prevent data recovery before encryption starts.
